name: coder-workflow
description: Orchestrator-driven coding workflow plugin — task decomposition, skill routing, architecture audit, Docker deploy.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run typecheck && node --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test "dist/test/**/*.test.js" "dist/test/*.test.js" "test/**/*.test.mjs" "test/*.test.mjs"
scripts.lint: biome check src test package.json tsconfig.json biome.json esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.format: biome format --write src test package.json tsconfig.json biome.json esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.check: biome check --write src test package.json tsconfig.json biome.json esbuild.config.mjs
